_meta: Concrete elective course offerings (expanded from courses.json's _elective_pool_reference) used by the M9 Demand Forecasting / new-elective feasibility engine. These are distinct from the 4 generic ELEC1-4 graduation-requirement slots in courses.json, which stay as-is for audit/planner purposes.

CMPS312.name: Mobile Application Development
CMPS312.description: Designing and building native and cross-platform mobile apps: UI/UX for mobile, device APIs, and app lifecycle management.

CMPS356.name: Web Applications Design and Development
CMPS356.description: Advanced full-stack web development: frameworks, REST APIs, authentication, and deployment.

CMPS360.name: Data Science Fundamentals
CMPS360.description: Data wrangling, exploratory analysis, statistical modeling, and visualization using modern data science tooling.

CMPS373.name: Computer Graphics
CMPS373.description: Rendering pipelines, 2D/3D transformations, shading models, and an introduction to real-time graphics programming.

CMPS381.name: Applied Cryptography
CMPS381.description: Symmetric/asymmetric cryptography, hashing, digital signatures, and their application in secure systems.

CMPS393.name: Modeling and Simulation
CMPS393.description: Discrete-event and continuous simulation techniques for modeling complex systems, with a project-based component.

CMPS399.name: Practical Training
CMPS399.description: Supervised industry internship applying CS coursework in a professional setting.

CMPS403.name: Artificial Intelligence
CMPS403.description: Search, knowledge representation, reasoning under uncertainty, and an introduction to intelligent agents.

CMPS433.name: Multimedia Systems
CMPS433.description: Representation, compression, and delivery of audio, video, and image data in interactive systems.

CMPS434.name: Game Design and Development
CMPS434.description: Game engines, physics, AI for games, and the full development pipeline from concept to playable prototype.

CMPS451.name: Database Management Systems
CMPS451.description: Advanced database internals: query optimization, indexing, concurrency control, and distributed data management.

CMPS453.name: Data Mining
CMPS453.description: Pattern discovery, clustering, classification, and association rule mining over large datasets.

CMPS460.name: Machine Learning
CMPS460.description: Supervised and unsupervised learning, model evaluation, and an introduction to neural networks.

CMPS465.name: Parallel Computing
CMPS465.description: Parallel architectures, multithreading, GPU programming, and performance optimization for parallel workloads.

CMPS466.name: Information Retrieval
CMPS466.description: Indexing, ranking, and search algorithms underlying modern search engines and recommendation systems.

CMPE480.name: Computer Vision
CMPE480.description: Image processing, feature extraction, object detection, and an introduction to deep-learning-based vision systems.

CMPE488.name: Wireless Networks and Applications
CMPE488.description: Wireless protocols, mobile network architectures, and application design for wireless/mobile environments.

CMPS497.name: Special Topics in Computing
CMPS497.description: Rotating advanced topic chosen by the department based on current relevance and faculty expertise.
